feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Updating LIPS Custom Fields In Outbound Delivery Using BAPI
entry.content:
Hey people,

I have an Issue in which I fail to update delivery item fields when using 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

I'll let you consider the following setting:

  • My System is ECC 6.0
  • I have extended standard table LIPS with a new field 'ZZEXT_REF'
  • I am receiving an update to the field mentioned with an incoming IDOC
    • something like [vbeln, posnr, ....., zzext_ref]

The solution I have gathered is this:

  1. Receive Delivery Number, Item Number, ZZEXT_REF from IDOC
  2. Call BAPI 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE' with 
    1. DELIVERY = Delivery Number from IDOC
    2. EXTENSION2 = (
      1. ROW = Delivery Row
      2. FIELD = ZZEXT_REF
      3. VALUE = Value from IDOC
  3. Implement BAdI SMOD_V50B0001~EXIT_SAPLV50I_010 (Similar to what is done here)
    1. Export EXTENSION2 values using static member of a BAdI "
      LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC
      " Class
  4. Implement (as said above) a BAdI Class of "LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC"
    1. Implement SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE, extract the data from the static member and insert it into field ZZEXT_REF of table CT_XLIPS at POSNR = ROW from EXTENSION2
  5. Call Commit After Calling 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'

The problem is that it all runs well except for the actual change save to table LIPS,
I thought it might be caused due to some efficiency mechanism that detected no changes to standard LIPS fields and therefore figured no changes should be done and dropped the change to db.

Suggestions will be suuuuuper useful.

Thanks,

Ariel.

entry.title: How to make Dlv.schedule & Dlv.sched.date optional in Forecast Delivery Schedule tab in SAP SD?
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Business wants to make the two fields (Dlv.schedule & Dlv.sched.date) as optional in Forecast Delivery Schedule (FDS) tab in the schedling agreement in SAP SD.
Could you please advise this configuration?

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question about uploading the customer details into SAP using Data Migration Cockpit for a customer who has Subscription Billing solution in place.

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, SAP Subscription Billing and Event Broker for the replications.

There is this Data Migration Cockpit Templates with SAP S/4. If we are having Subscription Billing solution for a project and customer created in Sub Bill and replicated in S/4. How do we approach loading the customers from their current system to SAP? Should all customers be loaded into Sub Bill first then replicated that into S/4 or directly feed in SAP S/4 via data migration template?

If we are using the data migration template for Customer directly to load data into S/4 is there a way to replicate that in Subscription Billing? Is the replication being unidirectional or bidirectional?

Please Advise.

@stefan_kiene SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP Sales Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Please advise.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: First confirmation date in Sale order - Any report available to extract?
entry.content:
Dear Connections, 

What's the first confirmation date in sale order? How can that be taken if the requested dates of line item is changed often ? 

Do we have any transaction / report / view to find it ?

Regards, 

Ajith Kumar A

entry.title: Manual Statistical Declaration International Trade in Goods
entry.content:
Hello

For NL, we have to report the Manual Statistical Declaration International Trade in Goods to CBS. 

Is tere anybody that knows the program in SAP ECC6 ?

 

Thank you for your help

Philippe

entry.title: How to create Mass Output Condition records in Sales and Billing output ( Vv11 and VV31) in SAP S/4
entry.content:
Hi I am looking for solution how can we create 2000 Sales output condition records in Sales and Biling document ( VV11 and VV31 ) in SAP system

I tried LSMW but LSWM is not available in SAP S/4 , so looking for alternative and Standard solution to create mass Output condition records for Sales /Billing document in SAP S/4.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category based on Incoterms entered at Sales Order level?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

The requirement: When creating a sales order that includes incoterms, the item category on the item line should default to YXXX. Also please also let me know if we can do something in the sales contract to avoid enhancement.

As per my research I did not find any blog or answers related to my requirement. Can anyone tell me is this possible? 

Regards,

Vardhan K

#SAP SD SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: BAPI to Cancel specific line items from billing document
entry.content: I have a Billing Document having 10 Line items and I want to cancel 2 line items out of it. VF11 provides facility to select specific line items and process it for cancellation. I am looking for a BAPI for above purpose to use in custom program.

entry.title: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the shipment document.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am getting an error message while adding delivery to the shipment document using Tcode "VT01N". However, the same deliver is being processed with tcode "VT01". Please advise solution if anyone has faced the same issue. Thanks. LE (Logistics Execution) SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Freely definable attributes in Customer master (KATR1-KATR10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edition and customer wanted to maintain their current system account ID in any one of the customer master data fields available in SAP Business Partner, I know that there are 10 freely defined attributes can be configured, but what is the length of these attribute value? Customer has account ID which is maximum of 30 characters. Is it possible to use these attribute fields for this?

Please advise.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA business partner SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: Configuration for PR to PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario - 1  I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. Let's say my supplying plant is A. If plant A has stock then it will allow to create delivery, PGI and billing.

Scenario - 2 I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. In plant A, there is no stock so stock deficit issue will happen during PGI.

In this 2nd scenario, i want to transfer stock from other plant, let's say Plant B.

So here Plant B is my supplying plant and Plant A is my receiving plant.

With reference to the PR, PO should create and stock transfer should happen plant B to Plant A

Once stock transfer is done,  then I will be able to do PGI for the scenario - 2.

Here storage location is same but different plants in stock transfer process.

NOTE : Scenario - 1 & Scenario - 2 should happen in a single transaction.

Please find below sketch

 

I need complete configuration so as to execute the transaction as per my requirement.

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" in Fiori APP.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

App ID: F5987

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: Alternate weight unit in different countries
entry.content: Our company creates a global material master that can be procured and sold throughout the world. We check the weight of goods at receipt and goods issue. In the EU we want to check the weight in KG (which is our unit of weight) but in the US we need to check the weight in LB. Is it possible in the standard to display weights in an additional unit  of weight in MIGO and VL02N (and other transactions) for specific users or for a specific org unit? Please note, this is not a question about units of measure. We know how to buy, sell and store in different UoMs.

entry.title: How EDI orders like Amazon is triggering particular storage location like Amazon stor loc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a query on IDOC's coming from EDI. I am unsure like how orders from Amazon customers trigger only Amazon storage locations when there are multiple storage locations.

There has been no determination made for this storage location with the plant in the system, and I have also checked the customer tables in SM30, no determination as well.

I have requested a source file from the customer to check the segment, I am stuck here, as I don't find any field as lgort in it.

Please guide me 

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Risk class update in mass from BAPI or any other tool for BP transaction
entry.content: I need to update Risk class in mass under Credit Profile Tab in BP transaction. Do we have any BAPI or tool which can be helpful to update for BP customers.

entry.title: List of Materials That Have A Specific Distribution Channel
entry.content:
Hello all - can anyone tell me if there is a table or query that can be run to find a list of all our materials with a given Distribution Channel? I want to pull a list of all our material assigned to a specific Channel.

 

Thank you in advance for any feedback you might have.

entry.title: ISSUE : BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE adding new item
entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: Instead of customer account, Expense GL should hit for Tax amount in FOC sales
entry.content:
Hi All

I have a below requirement.

We have a process which similar to FOC Sales.

Order-Delivery + Billing with net value 0 but Tax should be calculated on the Invoice but should not debit the customer account instead it should hit the some Expense GL account which company provide it. 

Since the product is sample customer will not pay but it is taxable and company should pay the tax to the Govt. Please let me know if you need any further details. by adding the R100 we are making the net value zero.

e.g. below 

 

I tried in Google to find out similar requirement post but did not find helpful solution to the above. Please share the link if the similar issue was discussed before in SCN.

Thanks!
